deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale cash deal. Closed and funded Apr 27. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 via Fernando Castillo signature at mobile notary. Post-close gift delivery and thank-you items still pending.

logs.m: Confirmed closed and funded. Post-close items still pending.
Transaction officially closed and funded.
Cleared and funded.
Fernando signed lien release. Release delivered to Alyssa at Chicago Title. Joyce signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo, family member of lien holder Fernando Castillo.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez — Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. First offer from Michael Rodriguez dead — no earnest money, RBFCU stalled. Clearing complete. New prospect interested in subdividing or alternate use. Strategy is land-only cash deal, buyer does what they need after close.
deals.next: Follow up with new prospect after showing. When next offer comes, lead with net after close. Arrange drone footage for marketing upgrade.

logs.m: Steve sent new photos. New prospect reached out wanting to show — interested in subdividing or alternate use. Sent her information and set expectations.
Clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer confirmed dead. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.
Current offer dead. Option money not received. Steve clearing property, open to overall picture on offers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Matt Toney (HouzzPro/San Antonio Remodelers) selected over T&T at $54,877 vs $61,980. Dumpsters running since Saturday. Chris on site today to meet Matt Toney and project manager.
deals.next: Meet Matt Toney on site today. Confirm work scope and timeline. Establish listing timeline once work is complete.

logs.m: Chris heading to property to meet Matt Toney and project manager. Dumpsters running since Saturday.
Work officially starting — Matt Toney dropping dumpsters this weekend.
Met Matt Toney in office. Connected him directly with Jerry Sadler (Priority Bank) on a call. Goal: work starts by next Monday.
Two estimates compared: HouzzPro $54,877 vs T&T $61,980. Jerry emailed Ray Stidham recommending HouzzPro.
Kelly confirmed damage occurred after bank possession, not before. Met Matt Van Gorder on site for estimate.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater VA listing. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. 208+ DOM. Sellers double-carrying apartment plus $2,843 mortgage. Three paths: short sale, VA assumption, or price cut with cash to close. Showing occurred May 5. Grass still unresolved.
deals.next: Get showing feedback from May 5 showing. Check on property while in Devine today. Follow up with Matt and Chandler on chosen path.

logs.m: Checking on property while in Devine. Still need showing feedback from May 5. Grass unresolved.
Dropping sign and lockbox at property. Keep marketing.
Outside agent showed at 2pm. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens — Morales Tree Trimming 830-444-7804. A.M. Lawn Care also visiting for quote.
Express Offers returned $550K — likely off vs CMA. Showing scheduled May 4.
Full market analysis complete. Underwater $93K-$143K. Three paths identified.

deals.title: Mike and Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. Pre-approval in progress with Zach Schaphorst. Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for them to browse. Rental clock is ticking.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval amount with Zach. Identify no-HOA new construction communities. Schedule model home visits.

logs.m: Sent new construction search platform. Next: confirm Zach pre-approval status.
Mike texted — rental being sold. Assessed 916 Marriott — foundation issues, 2011 roof, pass. Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns.

deals.notes: Prior clients going through divorce. Need to finish VA renovation and sell Moore TX home. Colton also looking for contractor work — potential hire for 181 CR 7751. Connected through Cynthia Dominguez and LRH group.
deals.next: Reach out to Colton — confirm listing timeline and property status. Offer him the 181 CR 7751 contractor job.

logs.m: File updated. Colton being considered for contractor work at 181 CR 7751. Check if Moore TX needs referral agent.

deals.title: Kurt — 9815 Conbes
deals.notes: Neighbor connected to 9815 Conbes listing, which is under contract at $275K. Kurt wants offer details. Could be a seller or buyer lead — needs follow-up to determine.
deals.next: Follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes offer details. Report back to Kurt. Determine if seller, buyer, or just curious.

logs.m: Kurt reached out about 9815 Conbes. Under contract at $275K. Wants offer intel.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip analysis for Homestead Vested. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. CMA comps show avg $207K, best comps at $140-$152/sqft. Building branded property analysis template from this deal.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Feed data to Sirhc and build first analysis sheet. Lock template for reuse.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via homesteadvested.com. Used as basis for property analysis tool build.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Referral from Isaac Linares. Seller relocating to NC by second week of June. Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13. Recommended list price $259,900. Hairline foundation crack flagged for disclosure. Pre-inspection done May 2 by Coach Ricky Smith.
deals.next: Canvass neighborhood and drop sign and lockbox Tuesday May 12. Launch MLS listing Wednesday May 13.

logs.m: Neighborhood canvassing moved to Tuesday May 12. Sign and lockbox drop also Tuesday.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live Wednesday May 13.
Pre-inspection at 8:30 AM with Coach Ricky Smith. Chris arrived ~10 AM to review findings.
Listing consultation on-site with Isaac, Jose, and Katherine. Sellers confirmed moving forward via email.
CMA completed — $259,900 recommended. Foundation crack flagged. Payoff discrepancy $170K vs $192K public records.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land listing with title defect — Deed 20100079485 has incomplete legal description, Exhibits C and F never attached at recording. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. ENV Title reviewing draft. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development at ~$150K. Sisters excited about development angle.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement to confirm who signed. Call sisters. Get attorney fee estimate from Van Hutchins. Follow up with Isaac on mobile home project timeline.

logs.m: Jennifer Ball email received. Title defect confirmed — incomplete legal description. Van Hutchins to prepare Correction Deed. Isaac also looking at owner finance options, buyers would need ~$15K down.
Updated sisters on Apr 20 showing. Isaac interested in developing with mobile homes — ~$150K offer, half units for veterans. Sisters enthusiastic.
Showing occurred. Call block on Borregas prospects.

deals.title: Moran — New Construction
deals.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. Builder rate buydowns are the angle. Not locked to any one builder. Rental setup also being coordinated — James Stringer owns 8527 Green Bliss (Lennar/Grace Gardens), plans to owner-occupy from California in 2 years.
deals.next: Send buyer rep confirmation to mom. Call Jimbo Stringer about 8527 Green Bliss rental. Follow up with new home sales reps on inventory options.

logs.m: New home sales reps pulling inventory options. Need to send buyer rep to mom and call Jimbo today on road to Devine.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs in folder for 8527 Green Bliss.

leads.title: Isaac Linares
leads.detail: Cross-referral partner — Linares Capital LLC. Mobile home and small acreage specialist. Referred 10023 Mill Path. Met his partner Adam Rodriguez Apr 21. Joint interest in off-market deals, bulk lots, and Borregas development (~$150K mobile home concept). Church-connected network.
leads.next: Thank Isaac for Mill Path referral. Follow up on Borregas development timeline. Help resolve Adam EMD discrepancy ~$1,200.

Referral logged. First contact led immediately to listing opportunity.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1,700/month rent. Military retirement income. Two daughters with disability income living with her. Between jobs — actively fixing credit. VA loan likely eligible (zero down). Source: Nextdoor, High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Call or text Pamela — check in, ease into home purchase conversation. Connect with VA-approved lender.

logs.m: Spoke today — sick grandkid, not right time. Warm conversation. Follow up tomorrow.
Follow-up text sent. Confirmed military retirement and daughters living with her.
Connected on Nextdoor. Paying $1,700 rent, fixing credit, motivated.
